200.description: List of tenant memberships for the authenticated user.

201.description: The created Tenant + the owner membership stamp.

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: HTTP status code generated by the origin server.

code.description: Stable machine-readable identifier (CORE_* or APP_* prefix).

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

instance.description: URI reference identifying the specific occurrence.
